title: Worker (subagent) item (GET /workers)
description: One live subagent/worker under a fleet agent — HouseTile windows and the ProgressStream. Source of truth: CONSOLE-CONTRACTS.md section 3.3 /workers — the bridged `fleet/<handle>.subagents.json` stream ({handle, label, started_at, updated_at, last_tool, tokens_spent?}), converging to box-agent inventory in Phase 1. `host` is REQUIRED and added by console-api aggregation so HouseTile windows never need a join to place a worker on a box. Filters: `handle`, `host`, plus the shared limit/cursor/since. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

handle.description: The OWNING agent's canonical handle (the worker belongs to this agent's session).

host.description: Machine label in canonical form ('.N' for lab dot-hosts). REQUIRED — added by aggregation, not by the producer.

label.description: Short worker label (subagent description / task slug).

started_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when the worker started.

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — last activity observed from the worker.

last_tool.description: Most recent tool the worker used (e.g. 'Bash'); null when unknown/idle.

tokens_spent.description: Tokens the worker has spent so far; null when the producer does not report it (optional in the as-built stream).
